summary: Surah Al-Balad swears by Mecca and the Prophet’s presence in it, declaring man created in toil. Man is deluded by power and wealth though Allah granted eyes, tongue, lips, and guidance to the two ways. He did not take the steep path: freeing a slave, feeding in famine an orphan near of kin or a destitute, then being of the believers who enjoin patience and compassion. These are the people of the right; deniers are people of the left, in a fire closed over them.
